config.title: #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'------ in-page use ------ dim g_bBroken function fopen g_bBroken = false page_.topelement.widgets.closepicture.disable = true end function
function btnBreak g_bBroken = true end function
function fback 'empty function disables standard functionality end function
'------ external use ------ function is_broken() is_broken = g_bBroken end function
sub configure_page(byval strTitle) page_.topelement.title = strTitle page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TITLE).value = strTitle end sub
sub update_page(byval strProgressMsg) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PROGRESS_MSG).value = strProgressMsg page_.updateview end sub
